query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO `invite_codes` (`code`, `cohortName`, `welcomeMessage`, `active`)
VALUES ('GO000', 'Study Group', 'Welcome! You now have full access to the community prep resource. Good luck with your preparation.', true);
